reviews.review_description: I an new to VR and i personally thought this is fun… until i played for like 1 hour then it got boring.

reviews.review_title: For those new to VR it's a great start
reviews.review_description:
So how to put this...
The game is good, it's more of a if you're new to VR it's a great start, it only has full locomotive movement, which new VR players can get motion sick from, but this is a great way to dive in without spending money and getting your VR training wheels on.
You got all the actions of what to expect in other VR games. Climbing, shooting, jumping, faster movement(sprinting)  manual reloading, opening doors etc.

But also it's a game designed to help you improve your VR legs for free. The whole idea is to get better & faster and complete the courses/levels in a faster time, basically improve yourself in VR space

Bow & arrow feels amazing and the gun play is spot on it's what you would expect from any shooter game.

Not sure what else to put is it graphically amazing, no. Is it one of the best VR games, no.
But does it do everything stated above and move YES.
So if you want something to help get you better in the VR space for free. This is that game 
Also if you love speed running levels the game is designed perfectly for you. 

I do actually like the VR hostage mission level.
Be fast & be accurate as if you shoot any of the hostages you restart the level. It's the 
One level I keep coming back to. That level is addictive as I always want to get a faster time but risk Vs reward is really high.
